ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Der fu?rtefflichen ... Jungfer Gabrielis Carola Patinin
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: u?ber die glu?cklich entsetzte ... Residentz-Stadt Wien auf der Italia?nischen Academie Padua in Lat. Sprach gehaltene ... Lob-Rede ... in das Teutsche ... uebersetzet. Lat. & Germ
ItacWorkItem.Subjects: Encomiastic discourse on the Turkish menace
ItacWorkItem.Notes: According to Viganò `Le donne e i Ricovrati` in L`Accademia in biblioteca (2004) p. 206 this could be Gabrielle`s German translation of her sister`s speech.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
